description: A high-priority comet outburst alert has been posted for 29P/Schwassmann-Wachmann 1. Using the target, coordinates, and configuration details found in ~/Documents/comet_alert.txt, capture at least five 60-second R-band CCD images to /home/ga/Images/comets/29P/R/ and at least three 45-second V-band CCD images to /home/ga/Images/comets/29P/V/. Generate a widefield sky view finding chart with a field of view of at least 1.0 degree using ~/capture_sky_view.sh and save it to /home/ga/Images/comets/29P/finding_chart.png. Write an ICQ-format observation report to /home/ga/Documents/icq_report_29P.txt including the estimated total magnitude, coma diameter, and degree of condensation. Ensure only new frames are present in the filter subdirectories for the final output.

metadata.industry: Scientific Research / Solar System Small Bodies Monitoring
